events.label: reasoning
events.text: 我们被要求输出一个JSON，场景是"group lockbox misused"，在Lockout/Tagout中。工作阶段是rough-complete。决策应该是fail，因为误用组锁箱是严重的不安全行为。风险等级可能是high或critical，取决于具体情况。这里提到"installed-defective"可能适用，因为组锁箱被误用，可能是安装但存在缺陷。但条件可能是"non-compliant"等。我们需要填写findings，actions，rationale等。根据OSHA 1910.147，组锁箱必须正确使用，每个授权员工必须亲自上锁等。所以这里误用组锁箱意味着可能不是每个人都在组锁箱上加了自己的锁，或者只由一个人控制等。这会导致无法保证能量隔离，可能导致严重伤害。因此decision应为fail，risk critical，component_conditions可能包括"non-compliant", "installed-defective"。percent_complete可能较低，因为还没有正确完成，但工作阶段是rough-complete，所以可能完成度不高。value无，sound_source无，event_time无，rate无，order和workable不需要？场景未给具体活动ID，可能空列表。references用OSHA 1910.147。confidence可以给高，比如0.95。输出JSON。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [
    "non-compliant",
    "installed-defective"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Group lockbox misused: individual locks not properly applied or controlled by each authorized employee.",
    "Potential for uncontrolled energy release due to inadequate lockout/tagout implementation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work and notify supervisor.",
    "Verify that each authorized employee applies their own lock to the group lockbox hasp before any work begins.",
    "Conduct a safety stand-down to review proper group lockout/tagout procedures per OSHA 1910.147."
  ],
  "rationale": "Group lockbox misuse violates OSHA 1910.147(c)(3)(ii) which requires that each authorized employee affix a personal lockout or tagout device to the group lockbox before work begins. This creates an imminent danger of unexpected energization or release of hazardous energy.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(3)(ii)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(4)"
  ]
}
